CRITICAL_DISK.diagnosis: Volume capacity reached critical threshold. Immediate action required to prevent service stoppage.
remediation_steps: Transfer legacy .bak files to Archive Tier (Z: drive)

CRITICAL_CPU.diagnosis: High CPU utilization detected. Active blocking chain or rogue process identified.

CRITICAL_TEMPDB.diagnosis: TempDB data file allocation exceeded safety threshold due to orphaned objects.

MAINTENANCE_INDEX.diagnosis: Index fragmentation detected above 20% on core tables.
remediation_steps: Update query optimizer thresholds via sp_updatestats

DEEP_DIAGNOSTICS.description: Performs high-level analysis of session requests and blocking IDs.

LIVE_JOBS.description: Queries SQL Agent for current status and outcomes of scheduled jobs.

LIVE_TELEMETRY.description: Captures real-time CPU, Free Disk Space, and Job Failures.

HEALTH_CHECK.description: Standardized health check utilizing Ring Buffers for CPU and disk volume checks.
